content.text: {"component":"vendoring","summary":"Vendoring is a Symfony 8/PHP 8.4 vendor-operations component now tagged v1.0.0-RC1 with strong QA/governance and deployment scaffolding indicating solid RC readiness.","strengths":["Tagged v1.0.0-RC1 with structured release scaffolding","Symfony 8 + Doctrine ORM baseline and coherent config/routing/services","Deep QA toolchain (phpstan, phpunit, Panther, Playwright) and scripted quality lanes","Robust governance/ops scaffolding (.gate, .deploy, compose) and RC evidence generation","API/docs generation hooks (OpenAPI, phpDocumentor)"],"risks":["CI execution and enforcement details not visible in this scan","Observability and SLO/health posture not evidenced","Public-market packaging/story remains internal-platform oriented (proprietary license)","E2E (Playwright) pipeline integration not confirmed"],"next_actions":["Ensure GitHub Actions run qa:full and Playwright tests on PRs/main","Publish RC evidence in CI artifacts and refresh Antora report to reflect RC1","Document health/readiness endpoints and baseline SLOs","Add logging/metrics/tracing wiring examples to deploy charts and compose","Clarify product positioning and integration boundaries in README/Antora","Export and publish OpenAPI spec artifact from CI"],"notes":["Assessment grounded in current repo tree and existing Antora report; deeper signals will be captured by the scheduled runner.","Scores largely preserved from prior snapshot; overall adjusted to reflect the RC1 tag."],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/vendoring/report/index.adoc","composer.json","package.json","RELEASE_NOTES.md","VENDORING_PROTOCOL_ANALYSIS.md","bin/generate-rc-evidence.php",".github/workflows",".gitleaks.toml",".deploy/helm",".deploy/docker",".deploy/systemd",".gate/quality","compose.yaml","config/bundles.php","config/vendor_routes.yaml","config/vendor_services.yaml","config/routes_runtime.php","phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist",".smoke/k6","bin/generate-openapi.php","bin/console"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":null,"market":null,"overall":9.0},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity is clearly vendor-operations–oriented and now backed by an RC1 tag and curated report/docs.","risks":["Positioning still reads as internal platform rather than a public product"],"improvements":["Tighten product pitch and feature matrix in README/Antora and link RC evidence"],"evidence":["README.md","RELEASE_NOTES.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/vendoring/report/index.adoc","VENDORING_PROTOCOL_ANALYSIS.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Symfony 8 + Doctrine 3 with explicit bundles/routing/services and vendor-focused configs indicate a coherent domain shape.","risks":["Bounded contexts and domain boundaries are not explicitly documented"],"improvements":["Document aggregates/bounded contexts and persistence contracts in Antora"],"evidence":["composer.json","config/bundles.php","config/vendor_routes.yaml","config/vendor_services.yaml","VENDORING_PROTOCOL_ANALYSIS.md"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Symfony runtime (console, routing, forms, mailer, CSRF) with Docker Compose and smoke surfaces establishes a real application surface.","risks":["Health/SLO posture and capacity guidance not evidenced in this scan"],"improvements":["Add health/readiness endpoints documentation and integrate k6 smoke into CI artifacts"],"evidence":["composer.json","config/routes_runtime.php","compose.yaml",".smoke/k6","bin/console"]},"qa":{"summary":"Strong QA lanes with phpstan/php-cs-fixer/PHPUnit/Panther/Playwright, phpunit.xml.dist, gitleaks, and scripted qa:* targets.","risks":["CI enforcement of all lanes (including Playwright) not confirmed in this scan"],"improvements":["Ensure GitHub Actions execute qa:full and Playwright tests and publish coverage/reports"],"evidence":["composer.json","phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist",".gitleaks.toml",".github/workflows","package.json"]},"ops":{"summary":"Governance and operational scaffolding are unusually strong with .gate policy/quality, .deploy (docker/helm/systemd), Compose, and RC evidence generation.","risks":["Observability (metrics/logging/tracing) wiring not surfaced; secrets/ops runbooks not visible"],"improvements":["Add observability configuration examples and document secrets/environment policy and runbooks"],"evidence":[".gate/quality",".deploy/helm",".deploy/docker",".deploy/systemd","compose.yaml","bin/generate-rc-evidence.php",".github/workflows"]},"market":{"summary":"Alignment targets enterprise vendor-operations as an internal platform; license is proprietary and public packaging is not emphasized.","risks":["External go-to-market and partner-facing packaging remain unclear"],"improvements":["Clarify ecosystem fit and integration paths in Antora/README and consider partner-facing docs"],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/vendoring/report/index.adoc","VENDORING_PROTOCOL_ANALYSIS.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"Tagged v1.0.0-RC1 with strong QA/governance and deployment scaffolding, the component demonstrates solid RC readiness.","risks":["RC discipline depends on CI enforcement and documentation staying current"],"improvements":["Connect scheduled assessment runner, enforce CI gates, and publish RC evidence artifacts in the report"],"evidence":["RELEASE_NOTES.md",".release/tag",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/vendoring/report/index.adoc",".github/workflows","bin/generate-rc-evidence.php"]}}}
